retest_input: Opened CASE-2026-00001 (MVX-2024-00003, Kampala Hosp), added entry, Cut interim bill slice (UI); ran tests/integration/interim-settlement.integration.test.ts

original_title: Exhausted/near-limit members could be paid above the binding limit
original_expected_result: Exhausted and near-limit members cannot be paid above the binding limit; system identifies the binding constraint and requires explicit partial/decline
retest_preconditions: IP-UAT-MALARIA fixture (INPATIENT 10M limit, 1M used -> 9M remaining; verified via computeAvailability)
retest_input: computeAvailability(12M request); recordUsage 12M / 9M / 9.001M in rolled-back txns
retest_expected_result: 12M over-approval blocked; binding constraint named; exact 9M allowed to remaining 0; no penny over
retest_actual_result: PASS: availability binds CATEGORY@9M; recordUsage 12M BLOCKED ([BENEFIT_CATEGORY_EXHAUSTED] must not consume more than 9M available); 9M exact ALLOWED remaining 0; 9,001,000 BLOCKED. Fixture left pristine (rolled back).
evidence_refs: notes/MEMBER_FIXTURES_BUILD.md; scripts/uat-ipdef06.ts (output captured in run log)
retest_result: FIXED-VERIFIED (service-level; UI partial-approval flow to confirm in Scenario 4 §15)
notes: THE #1 NO-GO condition (over-limit pay). Fail-closed backstop + availability gate both enforce. Exact-exhaustion (§15) also proven.

original_title: Interim slices do not carry the case's pre-authorisations (PA-required lines cannot be interim-settled; case PA/GOP holds not credited to slices)
original_affected_area: Interim slice adjudication x contract PA (11.5/13)
original_expected_result: A slice with a PA-required line adjudicates using the case's PA/GOP; the case hold is credited to the slice; residual PA stays usable by later slices
retest_scenario_step: scripts/uat-pa-slice-accept.ts on the VM — real PC-UAT-IP-2026 contract, MRI-BRAIN PA-required line
retest_preconditions: VM on fix branch 9733aa1, prisma client regenerated; fresh case CASE-2026-00011, MRI-BRAIN+WARD slice
retest_input: Phase A: decide slice with NO PA. Phase B: create APPROVED PA + ACTIVE hold, attach to CASE, decide the same slice
retest_expected_result: Phase A THROWS (gate intact, slice stays RECEIVED); Phase B ADJUDICATES via case read-through, hold credited, PA partial-consumed (stays APPROVED, caseId intact, not re-pointed)
retest_actual_result: Phase A: BLOCKED 'requires pre-authorization for: MRI-BRAIN (or attach one to its case)'; slice RECEIVED, no side effects. Phase B: APPROVED 1,450,000; hold credited -> 150,000 residual ACTIVE; PA APPROVED utilised 1,450,000 claimId null caseId intact; re-pointed-onto-slice count = 0.
notes: Read-through effectivePreauthWhere + in-tx re-read; cut-time re-point deleted; UTILISED counts for the gate. Steal-guards x4 + case-aware fraud parity + cancelCase guard shipped in the same commit.
